title: Simplify reference dataset selection to one DataSet-owned path

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Starting implementation of one-path reference dataset simplification.

Scope for this task:
- Remove role-based score pointers and dataset role tagging from active code paths.
- Make DataSet(scoreId + isReferenceFrozen + createdAt/id ordering) the only reference association model.
- Replace evaluation selector --reference-dataset-role with --use-score-reference and --all-score-references.
- Keep --dataset-id precedence over score-reference selection.
- Update GraphQL schema/client models/MCP surfaces/docs/tests accordingly.

Architecture constraints:
- No fallback logic.
- No backward-compatibility shim paths.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implementation update:
- Removed role-based reference dataset selection and pointer assignment from active code paths.
- Canonicalized reference lookup to DataSet-only association:
  - scoreId match
  - isReferenceFrozen = true
  - newest-first ordering by createdAt then id

Shipped behavior changes:
- evaluate accuracy:
  - removed --reference-dataset-role
  - added --use-score-reference (latest frozen dataset)
  - added --all-score-references (runs one evaluation per frozen reference dataset)
  - dataset-id remains explicit override
- dataset load:
  - kept --reference-frozen
  - removed --reference-role
  - removed --assign-reference-pointer

Schema/model/API/docs cleanup:
- Removed Score reference pointer fields from schema/model/client/MCP surfaces.
- Removed DataSet referenceRole from schema/model/client.
- Updated reference dataset docs and evaluate-score docs to the one-path workflow.

Validation:
- pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py => 4 passed
- pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/datasets_test.py -k "load_command_success or builtin_reference_cache_class_resolution or load_command_applies_item_pipeline_to_text" => 3 passed
- python -m py_compile on modified evaluation/dataset/MCP/model modules => passed

Status: in_progress pending your review + commit/merge.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Starting hard-cut rename from frozen terminology to neutral reference-dataset terminology.

Implementation intent:
- isReferenceFrozen -> isReferenceDataset
- frozenAt -> referenceAt
- --reference-frozen -> --reference-dataset
- keep --use-score-reference and --all-score-references
- no compatibility aliases/fallbacks

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Rename implementation complete (hard cutover):
- DataSet marker/ts renamed:
  - isReferenceFrozen -> isReferenceDataset
  - frozenAt -> referenceAt
- CLI renamed:
  - --reference-frozen -> --reference-dataset
- Evaluation resolver/UX text updated to reference-dataset terminology.
- Docs updated to remove frozen concept wording and examples.
- No aliases or compatibility fallbacks were added.

Validation:
- pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py => 4 passed
- pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/datasets_test.py -k "load_command_success or builtin_reference_cache_class_resolution or load_command_applies_item_pipeline_to_text" => 3 passed
- py_compile passed for modified Python modules.
- CLI option inspection confirms:
  - dataset load has --reference-dataset and does not have --reference-frozen
  - evaluate accuracy has --use-score-reference and --all-score-references

Note:
- Backend schema deployment is still required for runtime end-to-end selection via DataSet.isReferenceDataset in shared env.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting runtime validation: run aligned guideline-vetting report for score 45425 and extract eligible_reference_feedback_item_ids to verify we can generate a useful gold-standard candidate label list.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation completed for scorecard 1039 / score 45425 using aligned guideline-vetting mode. Report snapshot manual-aligned-20260402T192914Z analyzed 45 items and produced 32 eligible_reference_feedback_item_ids under rule 'unanimous non-contradiction' (artifact: tmp/aligned_vetting_1039_45425_days2_20260402T193100Z.json). Follow-up test of dataset builder path (dataset reference-from-feedback) failed at backend GraphQL with: Cannot query field 'isReferenceDataset' on type 'DataSet' (also referenceAt missing in same query surface). This confirms candidate-label list generation works, but dataset creation is currently blocked by backend schema deployment mismatch.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: hard cutover to associated-dataset model. Selection will use only DataSet.scoreId association, marker fields (isReferenceDataset/referenceAt) removed from active selection paths, CLI flags renamed to associated-dataset terminology, and docs/tests updated accordingly. No fallback aliases.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented associated-dataset hard cutover in active paths.

Shipped changes:
- evaluate accuracy flags renamed to --use-score-associated-dataset and --all-score-associated-datasets.
- Selection logic now uses only DataSet.scoreId association plus newest-first ordering by createdAt, tie-break id.
- Removed marker-based selection from resolver/query path; isReferenceDataset and referenceAt are not queried or filtered.
- dataset load removed --reference-dataset marker behavior; score association remains scoreId when source is score-linked.
- Updated associated-dataset language in docs and aligned-report UI messaging.
- Updated MCP dataset tool messaging to associated-dataset terminology.

Validation:
- pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py plexus/cli/dataset/datasets_test.py -k "reference or associated or load_command_success or build_reference_dataset_from_feedback_ids" => 8 passed.
- python -m py_compile plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations.py plexus/cli/dataset/datasets.py MCP/tools/dataset/datasets.py plexus/dashboard/api/models/data_set.py => passed.
- CLI help checks: evaluate accuracy --help shows new associated-dataset flags; dataset load --help no longer exposes --reference-dataset.

Architecture note:
- Active behavior is now one-path association-only selection; no fallback aliases were added.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Live validation continued after commit push.

Runtime checks executed:
1) evaluate accuracy with --use-score-associated-dataset for scorecard 1039 / score 45425.
   - Confirmed selector path logs: Using latest score-associated dataset.
2) evaluate accuracy with --use-score-associated-dataset --all-score-associated-datasets.
   - Confirmed aggregate runner path logs and summary table render.
3) evaluate accuracy with both --dataset-id and --use-score-associated-dataset.
   - Confirmed precedence logs: Using specific dataset ID.

Follow-up fix applied:
- Corrected GraphQL variable type in recent-evaluation lookup helper (createdAfter now String in query signature) to prevent type mismatch in all-associated-datasets path.

Current runtime blocker for full success:
- Dataset used for runtime checks has no file/attachedFiles payload in backend record, so evaluation fails at sample loading with No Parquet or CSV files found.
- Selection behavior itself is validated; successful metric run still requires a valid dataset artifact file.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation follow-up: fixed GraphQL query variable type mismatch in recent evaluation lookup by changing createdAfter variable type to String to match deployed schema. Re-ran associated dataset tests and latest/all selection flow now reaches evaluation summary path.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: End-to-end associated-dataset runtime validation completed successfully for score 45425 on scorecard 1039. Created file-backed associated dataset bb30680d-694d-41a1-b18c-6cbeed0d8cf1 (12 rows from labeled feedback items), then ran accuracy with --use-score-associated-dataset and completed evaluation 38040d31-a060-4fe7-b6b0-af904a0827af (status COMPLETED, processedItems 12/12, accuracy 66.6667, precision 100, recall 63.6364). Key runtime requirement discovered: AMPLIFY_STORAGE_DATASETS_BUCKET_NAME must be set for cloud dataset read/write in this shell; without it, setup fails with S3 bucket name not found.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation for new canonical curation path: add plexus score dataset-curate with --max-items default 100 and optional --days, using newest-first feedback selection by editedAt and strict finalAnswerValue qualification; remove dataset reference-from-feedback from active CLI entrypoints to enforce one-path usage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented canonical curation flow: added plexus score dataset-curate (scorecard, score, max-items default 100, optional days, optional task-id), backed by new dataset curation helper module with deterministic newest-first collection (editedAt DESC) and strict finalAnswerValue plus linked item qualification. Removed dataset reference-from-feedback from active dataset CLI commands. Updated docs and dashboard task launcher route to invoke score dataset-curate. Validation: pytest subset passed (11 tests), py_compile passed, CLI help shows score dataset-curate and dataset group no longer exposes reference-from-feedback.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime test completed for new command. Initial run of score dataset-curate failed due deployed CreateDataSetInput rejecting extra fields; fixed curation path to send only supported dataset fields. Retest succeeded: plexus score dataset-curate --scorecard 1039 --score 45425 --max-items 20 --days 180 created dataset 71289e19-e160-4e1e-89bd-8bd1cdd0f8df (20/20). Follow-up accuracy run succeeded against associated dataset selection: evaluation f437bce3-418a-4586-b391-42810d3f0575 COMPLETED, sample size 20, accuracy 45.0%.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Closing: canonical score dataset-curate path implemented, old dataset reference-from-feedback CLI entrypoint retired, docs updated, and live runtime test passed (dataset-curate + associated-dataset evaluation).
